edited.text: When you reach the White Marks district, you notice an immediate tone shift from the night before, when you spoke with Golanthus, to this afternoon. The district is almost on lockdown—guards everywhere. As you pass into the White Marks, you see the training grounds full of young White Marks Ekujae drilling military combat. They're running drills. Golanthus is in the training grounds, and you go to his war council tent.
